playbook.intent: Last week's prompt-version candidates → one merged, one rolled-back, one parked.
playbook.scope: Decide which of last week's prompt-version candidates graduates to default. Output: one merged PR, one rolled-back PR, one parked. Weekly cadence, ~60-90 min.

success-criteria.criterion: Each candidate scored on judge + cost

stage.name: Pull A/B Results
stage.intent: Collect last week's A/B traces per candidate.

tasks.task: Pull traces grouped by prompt version
Confirm prompt-cache prefix order didn't change

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each candidate has enough traces for power.

stage.name: Judge & Compare
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when delta is statistically credible.

stage.name: Land Decisions

tasks.task: Merge the winner with version pin
Park the inconclusive with calendar reminder

stage.decision-gate: Ship only after pin manifest is updated.

extra.value: [Model-version A/Bs — covered by `bench-against-new-sota-model`, End-to-end UX A/Bs]
[A/B fixture from eval-harness playbook, ≥2 prompt candidates with at least 100 traces each]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content weekly-prompt-version-ab-review --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-prompt-version-ab-review --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-prompt-version-ab-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
